name: scheduler
description: The Lookout, productized (Trio_Specs §C): sensor-only usage poller writing signal files (usage.json + self-clearing ALERT/PAUSE) under .ship/lookout/, a session-independent guard harness that keeps the sensor alive and resurrects a capped session at most once per usage window (session-pinned --resume, never --continue), a mission lockfile so two supervisors can never own one repo, and print-only Task Scheduler/cron registration. The session is primary; the Lookout is its instrument.
